title: Hypixel Skyblock Enchanted 1.8.9
description: Hypixel Skyblock Enchanted is a highly immersive Minecraft experience, enhanced with quality mods that elevate gameplay through advanced features like improved HUDs, item trackers, and automation tools.
body:
# **Hypixel Skyblock Enchanted FORGE 1.8.9**
Hypixel Skyblock Enchanted is a highly immersive Minecraft experience, enhanced with quality mods that elevate gameplay through advanced features like improved HUDs, item trackers, and automation tools. These mods streamline resource management and combat, offering players a more efficient and strategic adventure.

Also adds a ton of **_performance boosting mods_** that boost your FPS in game.
FORGE 1.8.9

I HIGLY recommend for using Texturepack _**Worlds and Beyond**_ and _**optifine V5**_

### Mods
- Entity culling
- Fps Reducer
- Hytils Reborn
- NotEnoughUpdates
- multithreadedchunkloading
- PolySprint
- PolyPatcher
- SkyblockAddons (unoffical)
- Skyblock Tweaks
- Skyblock Utils
- Fullbright

### Texture packs
- FurfSky Reborn FULL
- Wiped's Skyblock Overlay
- Skyblock Fusion
- Hypixel +
- AetherPack
- Default Darkmode

**_RECOMMENDED TEXTUREPACK ORDER!!!_**
![BEST RECOURCEPACK ORDER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a243b42f332edf14ba4fe2a12fad06e2dcff872b.png)
### SCREENSHOTS!
NotEnoughUpdates type /neu in the chat to open the mod GUI
![NotEnoughUpdates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8fe17a4ffca9b2aa8d51e51e3c445e5c7347de0.png)
SkyblockAddons (unoffical) the mods GUI are shown when you press "esc" and press button in right down

![SkyblockAddons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/889cd1ac1a6b18b9e8b0a20529252767509fc16f.png)
Storage GUI

![Storage GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dff7b43ee384e668e31f47f7e6de6fec0ab94445.png)
Hub

![Hub](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5545fb04aa2dad54f569690d135c9d5971199b6.png)
